name: black bean soup
steps: ['heat oil in a pot', 'saute onion and garlic until soft', 'add black beans and broth', 'simmer for 30 minutes', 'blend half and season with salt and cumin']

name: classic margherita pizza
steps: ['preheat oven to 250 c', 'roll out the dough', 'spread tomato sauce', 'add fresh mozzarella and basil', 'bake for 12 minutes until crust is golden']

name: chicken stir fry
steps: ['slice chicken into strips', 'heat a wok over high heat', 'stir fry chicken until browned', 'add mixed vegetables and soy sauce', 'serve over rice']

name: banana oat pancakes
steps: ['mash bananas in a bowl', 'mix in oats eggs and milk', 'heat a nonstick pan', 'pour batter and cook until bubbles form', 'flip and cook the other side']

name: lentil curry
steps: ['rinse the lentils', 'saute onion garlic and ginger', 'add curry spices and tomato', 'add lentils and water', 'simmer until tender and season']
